## [00:00 - 03:01]

Okay, so now just a couple of quick tactical considerations. When you're creating your pre-launch content, including your emails, videos, the sales letter or sales video, anything like that, one of the things you want to do is avoid dating it in any way. So you don't want to mention holidays, you don't want to mention seasons, you don't want to mention the year, you want to keep seasonality stuff out of there, you know, don't talk about graduations, probably you want to avoid birthdays, you don't talk about Christmas, you probably don't want to shoot your video like if it's a winter, you don't want to shoot it there with all kinds of snow in the background. If you're gonna shoot outside, try to make it as non-seasonal as possible, you know, you probably don't want a lot of fall color in the trees and stuff, you can probably get away, you know, if you live in Southern California, you can do, you know, you can go out or Florida, some place where it's always warm, you're probably safer that way, but you just want to always be thinking about whatever you're saying and stuff in the background, you want to keep anything that dates it out of there, you don't, if you're doing, even in your product, if you're doing like calls that are going to be recorded as part of the product, you don't want to be mentioning dates in there and things like that, so just as you go through all your stuff, you definitely want to be careful about dates, a lot of times in your sales letter you might want to mention, oh this shuts down on such and such a date or you got to order by such and such a date, you got to be real careful with that. Another thing is, you know, especially in your emails, if you're going to try to go purely evergreen and use auto responders, then you have to be real careful about how you handle dates in there as well, another good reason to, you know, possibly consider going, using broadcasts for your emails instead, but basically you're going to have to, I mean, you definitely, if you're evolving from, you did a product launch and now you want to go evergreen with the product launch, you definitely want to go back through all of your content, all your pre-launch videos, blog posts, whatever that, with a fine-toothed home and keep an eye out for any dates, keep an eye out for any holidays, mentioning, you don't want to mention anything happening in the news, anything topical or, you know, those type of things, being topical, mentioning stuff in the news, that can be great in launches, to bring that into launches, but it'll mesh up on evergreen launches, so just be real careful about all that stuff as you go through this stuff, as you go through your pre-launch content. If you're just creating your launch right now, you might

want to think ahead of time and avoid any of those mentioning any kind of stuff like that, any seasonality, any news, any events, anything like that, that could possibly date it.
